en: How’s the weather today?

ab: parulritek na wari, puwapuwa ’emau za vi’as za ’ enay.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: parulritek na wari harem, puwapuwa ’emau za vi’as za zanum.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: paruvi’as na wari harem, puwapuwa ’emau za ’enay.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: paruvi’as na wari harem, puwapuwa ’emau za zanum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: panana na ’unin, ikalalup patala’ za senan.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: panana na kadaw, ikalalup patala’ za senan.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?
cloudy and the cloud blocks out the sun.

ab: kemutrem, temala’ na kutrem kana kadaw.
en: cloudy and the cloud blocks out the sun.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ch: B:明天不會出太陽，陰天而且風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ch: B:明天不會出太陽，陰天而且風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: kemuda na wari nu kanizu na wari?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: parulritek nu azu na wari, pikaytu nu muwapatraran.
ch: B:那天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.
How’s the weather on the weekend?
It will be sunny on the weekend.
Will it be rainy that day?

ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.
Will it be rainy that day?
Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?
The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: dali’ lra, mupana lra na kadaw.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?
It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: ’azi ’ema’udalr harem, ’a’udalr nu piya kare’alri, pisuku nu mupatraran.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: kalritek nu mari’ami nu vetriliyan awlra?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ai, kalritek nu mari’ami nu vetriliyan, puwapuwa pikiping.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: ai, kalritek nu mari’ami nu vetriliyan, puwapuwa pikavang.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: kavi’as nu derun harem kana ’ami awlra?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ai, kavi’as nu derun, puwapuwa ’emau za ’enay.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: ai, kavi’as nu derun, puwapuwa ’emau za zanum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ab: sahar ku nu kaseveran, sadeku na wari.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?
Do you like autumn?
Do you like autumn?

ab: ’azi ku sahar nu ’emami, sazu a variw.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.

ab: ’azi ku sahar nu venetratrili, sazu a variw.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.

ab: ’azi ku sahar nu kautrerahan, sazu a variw.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
